ALL COURTESY COPIES SHALL BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Shaun A. Markley, of Nicholas & Tomasevic, LLP, Tel. 619.325.0492, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order and proposed judgment that complies with CRC 3.1312. All courtesy copies shall be delivered to Dept. 302. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
